message:
test(forget): Add unit tests for forget command

Adds 5 unit tests covering the forget command functionality:
- Requires reason flag (exits with error if missing)
- Forgets bullet and adds to blocked log (deprecates bullet, creates
  blocked.log entry)
- Forget with invert flag creates anti-pattern (AVOID: prefix,
  isNegative=true, inverted tag)
- Returns error for non-existent bullet ID
- JSON output format (validates success, bulletId, action fields)

Uses withTempCassHome helper to create isolated test environments with
their own config, playbook, and diary directories.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
